'''sabufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wae|wae]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wae|wae]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sabufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæbifith|sæbifith]] || [[word:sæbifij|sæbifij]] || [[word:sæbifish|sæbifish]] || [[word:sæbifi|sæbifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sabubufuth|sabubufuth]] || [[word:sabubufuj|sabubufuj]] || [[word:sabubufush|sabubufush]] || [[word:sabubufu|sabubufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sabufuth|sabufuth]] || [[word:sabufuj|sabufuj]] || [[word:sabufush|sabufush]] || [[word:sabufu|sabufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sabuffuth|sabuffuth]] || [[word:sabuffuj|sabuffuj]] || [[word:sabuffush|sabuffush]] || [[word:sabuffuf|sabuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sabufuthu|sabufuthu]] || [[word:sabufuju|sabufuju]] || [[word:sabufushu|sabufushu]] || [[word:sabufuku|sabufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sabufuth|sabufuth]] || [[word:sabufuj|sabufuj]] || [[word:sabufush|sabufush]] || [[word:sabufu|sabufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sabufuthul|sabufuthul]] || [[word:sabufujul|sabufujul]] || [[word:sabufushul|sabufushul]] || [[word:sabufukul|sabufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sabufuthuthu|sabufuthuthu]] || [[word:sabufujuju|sabufujuju]] || [[word:sabufushushu|sabufushushu]] || [[word:sabufuku|sabufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sabufuthun|sabufuthun]] || [[word:sabufujun|sabufujun]] || [[word:sabufushun|sabufushun]] || [[word:sabufukun|sabufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sabufuthuoro|sabufuthuoro]] || [[word:sabufujuoro|sabufujuoro]] || [[word:sabufushuoro|sabufushuoro]] || [[word:sabufukuoro|sabufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
